headline: Nubank swipes Visa vet for CFO amid US push
summary: Shares of the Brazilian neobank’s parent slumped Tuesday, one day after it announced its long-time CFO was stepping down.

headline: Ending soon: Earn 150,000 miles with this all-time-high Capital One Venture Business offer
summary: It's rare to see offers this large attached to credit cards with sub-$100 annual fees, like the Capital One Venture Business.

headline: Nu Holdings Shares Down 22% As It Names New CFO For US Push
summary: Visa veteran Rob Livingston joins as CFO as Nubank prepares for planned US banking expansion.

headline: iHeartMedia Announces Lineup for the 2026 iHeartRadio Music Festival Presented by Capital One
summary: NEW YORK, June 02, 2026--iHeartMedia today announced the lineup for the 2026 iHeartRadio Music Festival presented by Capital One, the annual concert event taking place on Friday, Sept. 18 and Saturday, Sept. 19 at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. Hosted by Ryan Seacrest, the epic two-day lineup for the iHeartRadio Music Festival presented by Capital One will feature performances by BTS, Benson Boone, Cardi B, Goo Goo Dolls, Kenny Chesney, Lainey Wilson, Major Lazer, Muse, Snoop Dogg, Weezer and Zara

headline: Does Nubank’s New Visa-Veteran CFO Reshape the Strategic Playbook for Nu Holdings (NU)?
summary: Nubank has announced that Rob Livingston, a former senior executive at Visa and Capital One, will assume the role of Chief Financial Officer on July 13, 2026, succeeding longtime CFO Guilherme Lago, who shifted to a Special Advisor position and will continue to support the finance and strategy function. This handover marks a shift from a finance leader who oversaw Nubank’s evolution into a large digital banking platform to an incoming CFO with deep global payments and credit experience...
